Class TGWorker

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.SwingWorker<Void,Void>
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen.TGWorker
All Implemented Interfaces:
InterruptListener, StopRequest, Runnable, Future<Void>, RunnableFuture<Void>, EventListener
public class TGWorker extends SwingWorker<Void,Void> implements InterruptListener, StopRequest
The worker must be started using method start() and not via the standard SwingWorker.execute().
